MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: B. TOMOTHY MURPHY, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANTS/MOVING PARTIES, TOMMY AND ROSEMARIE KLEINERT.
PALVIR K. SHOKER, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, ALAN WONG.

ARGUED. TENTATIVE ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATION. Defendants' Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories and Request For Production Of Documents and Attendance and Testimony At Deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiffs are ordered to respond to the interrogatories and document requests within 30 days of notice of this order. Plaintiffs are further ordered to appear for their depositions to be noticed by Defendants and to be completed no later than August 26, 2005. (612/HEWLETT)

RULING: Hearing held. The Court granted the motion subject to pltfs counsel appearing at a discovery motion, currently set for 07/15/05 (or whenever it is heard, if continued). (301/PHA/ju) Court Reporter Robert Balian, CSR #5220
